parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a human actor with an AI-generated robot avatar. The robot exhibits typical AI traits like slightly unnatural lip-syncing and a static background. The voices are likely AI-generated or heavily processed.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. Smooth white synthetic face with grey eyes. Metallic body with exposed joints and wiring at the neck and shoulders.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing, exposed white and metallic robotic exterior.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion. Short dark hair and a light beard/mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue t-shirt with thin white horizontal stripes.
characters.demeanor: Curious, slightly hesitant, and eager to learn.

scenes.setting: Top: Bright cafe with plants. Bottom: Cozy living room.

panels.panel_visual_description: A humanoid female robot sits in a brightly lit cafe. The robot has a smooth, white, synthetic face with grey eyes and a metallic body with exposed joints and wiring at the neck and shoulders. She is framed in a medium close-up, looking directly forward. Her right hand is raised slightly, resting near her chest. Behind her, a large window reveals green foliage outside, while the interior features warm pendant lights and a textured wall.

A young man is seated indoors, framed in a medium close-up facing the camera. He has a slim build, brown complexion, short dark hair, and a light beard. He wears a light blue t-shirt with thin white horizontal stripes. The background is a softly blurred living room, showing a portion of a sofa with patterned cushions and warm, natural lighting illuminating his face from the right.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a robot avatar on top and a human male on the bottom, engaged in a conversation. Dynamic text captions appear in the center of the screen, along with red cross and green checkmark icons to indicate incorrect and correct English usage.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: काल कुठे गेला होतास? [Where did you go yesterday?]

Character B says: I went to माल yesterday. [I went to maal yesterday.]

Character A says: माल? प्रणाउन्सिएशन थोडं चुकलं. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. [Maal? The pronunciation is a bit wrong. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday.]

Character A says: काल काय खाल्लस? [What did you eat yesterday?]

Character B says: I eat पीजा खाल्ला. [I eat peeja ate.]

Character A says: पीजा? नाही. Pizza. आणि गोष्ट कालची आहे म्हणून Eat नाही Ate. I ate pizza. [Peeja? No. Pizza. And the event is from yesterday, so not Eat, but Ate. I ate pizza.]

Character A says: ट्रेन कुठून पकडतोस? [Where do you catch the train from?]

Character B says: I pick train from railway ईस्टेशन. [I pick train from railway e-station.]

Character A says: Pick? Pick म्हणजे उचलणं. ट्रेन उचलणार का? Catch म्हणजे पकडणं. आणि ईस्टेशन नाही, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Are you going to lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not e-station, Station. I catch the train from the railway station.]

Character B says: Ohhh माझं प्रणाउन्सिएशन वीक आहे. [Ohhh my pronunciation is weak.]

Character A says: काही हरकत नाही. AI टीचर ट्राय केलं का? [No problem. Have you tried an AI teacher?]

Character B says: तो महाग असेल ना? [That must be expensive, right?]

Character A says: अजिबात नाही. नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा सातपट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून ५० लाख लोक MySivi वर प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is seven times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.]

Character B says: पण टाईम मिळत नाही रोज. [But I don't get time every day.]

Character A says: फक्त १५ ते २० मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस पुरेसं आहे. हळूहळू कॉन्फिडंट होशील. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice is enough. You will slowly become confident.]

Character B says: वाव, कसं जॉईन करू? [Wow, how do I join?]

Character A says: खाली इन्स्टॉल बटनावर क्लिक कर. MySivi ॲप इन्स्टॉल कर, साईन अप कर आणि प्रॅक्टिस सुरू कर. फक्त १५ दिवसात इम्प्रूव्हमेंट दिसायला लागेल. [Click on the install button below. Install the MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, dark, almost black background with a subtle gradient. No physical objects, characters, or environments are visible.

scenes.visual_description: A promotional end-card showing a special offer. It features a large '₹1' graphic, a crossed-out '₹30', and text highlighting the benefits of 'MySivi Pro'. A yellow 'Start Trial at ₹1' button is at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयांमध्ये ३ दिवसांसाठी आहे. आत्ताच सुरू कर. [The trial is for just 1 rupee for 3 days. Start right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
MySivi
Sale Ends Today
सगळं UNLOCK करा (Unlock everything)
OFFER ₹30 ₹1
MySivi Pro फायदे (MySivi Pro benefits)
२४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher (24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher)
तुमचं grammar correct होईल instant feedback सोबत. (Your grammar will be correct with instant feedback.)
Offer ends in 09:58
Pay using PhonePe
Start Trial at ₹1
सगळे Payments safe आहेत. कधीही Cancel करू शकता. (All payments are safe. Can cancel anytime.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D render of a modern smartphone standing upright against a solid light purple background. The phone has a sleek, dark metallic edge and a visible front-facing camera cutout at the top center of its screen. The screen itself is blank white.

scenes.visual_description: A 3D mockup of a smartphone against a light purple background. The phone's screen displays the 'MySivi' logo and the text 'English speaking app' along with a purple 'Install Now' button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Install now वरती क्लिक करा आणि MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड करा. [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
